sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n540" key="a)gkalidagwgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκᾰλῐδ-ᾰγωγός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n540.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying an armful</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bundle,</tr_> of beasts of burden; <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκαλιδη-φόρος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκᾰλῐδ-φορέω</orth> being used of men, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:139" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.139</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.109</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
